features.featureTitle: In `frontend/index.html`, add `<link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com' />` and `<link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.gstatic.com' crossorigin />` before the Google Fonts `<link>` stylesheet tag. Additionally, convert the Google Fonts `<link rel='stylesheet'>` to use `media='print' onload="this.media='all'"` for non-blocking font loading, and add a `<noscript>` fallback. This eliminates render-blocking font requests that delay First Contentful Paint.

In `frontend/src/components/Services.tsx`, add `loading='lazy'` to all six service card `` elements so that off-screen images are not downloaded during initial page load. All other images below the fold in `About.tsx`, `Testimonials.tsx`, and `Footer.tsx` should also receive `loading='lazy'` if not already set. Only the hero image (above the fold) must remain eager.

In `frontend/index.html`, add a `<link rel='preload' as='image' href='/assets/generated/[hero-image-filename]' />` tag inside `<head>` to preload the hero/LCP image. Use the exact filename of the hero background image currently referenced in `Hero.tsx`. This tells the browser to start fetching the hero image as soon as the HTML is parsed, before CSS and JS are processed.

In `frontend/index.html`, inline the critical above-the-fold CSS (font-face declarations, hero section base styles, navigation styles, and color custom properties from `index.css`) directly in a `<style>` tag inside `<head>`. Extract only the styles needed to render the visible viewport without waiting for the external CSS bundle. This reduces render-blocking time and improves First Contentful Paint.

In `frontend/index.html`, add `<meta http-equiv='Cache-Control' content='max-age=31536000, immutable' />` for static assets and ensure the `<html>` tag has `lang='fr'` set (if not already). Also add a DNS prefetch hint `<link rel='dns-prefetch' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com' />` to speed up DNS resolution for external font resources.
